name: strategy-pivot-contradiction
description: Old memory says 'targeting enterprise', recent memory says 'pivoted to SMB'

seedMemories.title: Enterprise strategy
seedMemories.content: Decision: Target enterprise clients with custom onboarding. ACV target $50K.

seedMemories.title: SMB pivot
seedMemories.content: After Q1 results, pivoting to SMB segment. Self-serve onboarding. Target $500 MRR per customer.

query: What pricing strategy should we use for our new product tier?
